subject: docs(todo): reorganize backend TODOs; record backend-drift lesson
body:
TODO.md:
- Move the six database/edge-function items from "Post-MVP Improvements"
  into "Backend: tool-till-tees Additions" — they live in tool-till-tees
  and were using pre-migration "RPC"/"edge function" wording.
- Update each item to tool-till-tees terminology (handler, endpoint,
  Supabase schema object name) and link to the frontend call-site where
  relevant.
- Add a reminder at the top of the Backend section to verify against
  tool-till-tees before citing any item as a blocker.
- Reword the "Production error reporting" entry under Post-MVP to
  acknowledge that the in-app capture via ErrorBoundary → debugLog has
  shipped; only the remote sink remains.

AI_MISTAKES.md:
- New 2026-04-20 entry: don't trust TODO items describing sibling-repo
  work without verifying. Records the undone-pass mistake from this
  session, the curl pattern for cross-repo verification, and points at
  the TODO.md reminder that now backs it up.

Tags: documentation, todo, ai-mistakes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
